{
  "cefr_level": "A2",
  "level_basis": {
    "textinspector_level_raw": null,
    "flesch_kincaid": null,
    "rule_notes": "Holistic estimation. Chosen A2 due to frequent basic grammatical errors (agreement, prepositions) despite clear communication and task fulfillment. Borderline B1, but lower level selected for reliability per methodology."
  },
  "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes",
  "communicative_task_notes": [
    "Addresses prompt directly (answers post, gives tips).",
    "Sentence count approx 11 (Task requirement: 10 sentences)."
  ],
  "grammar_score": 0.65,
  "corrections": [
    "i -> I (Register; A1; Low)",
    "simular -> similar (Lexis; A2; Low)",
    "Here is the tips -> Here are the tips (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "this apps -> these apps (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "spend a lot of time to TV -> spend a lot of time on TV (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "leave from useless groups -> leave useless groups (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "at VK -> on VK (Grammar; A2; Low)",
    "enought -> enough (Lexis; A2; Low)",
    "I hope, my -> I hope my (Punctuation; A2; Low)",
    "write me at personal messages -> write me in personal messages (Grammar; A2; Medium)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {
        "excerpt": "simular",
        "correction": "similar",
        "comment": "Spelling error of common adjective.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "enought",
        "correction": "enough",
        "comment": "Spelling error of quantifier.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      }
    ],
    "Grammar": [
      {
        "excerpt": "Here is the tips",
        "correction": "Here are the tips",
        "comment": "Subject-verb agreement error (plural subject).",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "this apps",
        "correction": "these apps",
        "comment": "Demonstrative agreement error (plural noun).",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "spend a lot of time to TV",
        "correction": "spend a lot of time on TV",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition collocation.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "leave from useless groups",
        "correction": "leave useless groups",
        "comment": "Unnecessary preposition 'from'.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "at VK",
        "correction": "on VK",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition for social media platforms.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "write me at personal messages",
        "correction": "write me in personal messages",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition for communication channels.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      }
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {
        "excerpt": "I hope, my",
        "correction": "I hope my",
        "comment": "Unnecessary comma after introductory clause.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      }
    ],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],
    "Register": [
      {
        "excerpt": "i",
        "correction": "I",
        "comment": "Lowercase 'i' is incorrect in standard English.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A1"
      }
    ],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {
      "item": "social media",
      "cefr_level": "B1",
      "category": "Vocabulary",
      "note": "Topic-specific vocabulary used correctly."
    },
    {
      "item": "Manage your time",
      "cefr_level": "B1",
      "category": "Grammar",
      "note": "Imperative structure used effectively for advice."
    },
    {
      "item": "calendars",
      "cefr_level": "B1",
      "category": "Vocabulary",
      "note": "Relevant vocabulary for time management context."
    }
  ],
  "feedback": "Level A2. The text successfully addresses the task with clear tips and structure. Key patterns include frequent basic errors in subject-verb agreement ('Here is the tips') and prepositions ('spend... to TV'). Strengths include appropriate topic vocabulary ('social media', 'calendars') and clear organization. Methodology: Lower level (A2) chosen for reliability due to error density despite task fulfillment.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Review subject-verb agreement rules (is/are, this/these).",
    "Practice common preposition collocations (on TV, in messages).",
    "Proofread for spelling errors (similar, enough) before submitting."
  ]
}

{
  "cefr_level": "B1",
  "level_basis": {
    "textinspector_level_raw": null,
    "flesch_kincaid": null,
    "rule_notes": "Holistic assessment based on vocabulary range (B1-B2), grammar control (B1), and cohesion (B1+). Errors in word order and articles prevent B2 classification."

  "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes",

    "Addresses the prompt directly by responding to the student's concern.",

    "Meets the sentence count requirement (approx. 14 sentences)."
  ],
  "grammar_score": 0.75,
  "corrections": [
    "decition -> decision (Lexis; B1; Low)",
    "tips how to -> tips on how to (Grammar; B1; Low)",
    "each my day -> each of my days (Word order; B1; Medium)",
    "other's works -> others' work (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "very important thing -> a very important thing (Grammar; B1; Low)",
    "studying, I try -> studying. I try (Punctuation; B1; Medium)",
    "rest within them -> rest during them (Lexis; B1; Low)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {
        "excerpt": "decition",
        "correction": "decision",
        "comment": "Spelling error of a common noun.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "rest within them",
        "correction": "rest during them",
        "comment": "Preposition collocation error.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      }
    ],
    "Grammar": [
      {
        "excerpt": "tips how to",
        "correction": "tips on how to",
        "comment": "Missing preposition after 'tips'.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "other's works",
        "correction": "others' work",
        "comment": "Incorrect plural possessive and countability of 'work'.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "very important thing",
        "correction": "a very important thing",
        "comment": "Missing indefinite article.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      }
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {
        "excerpt": "studying, I try",
        "correction": "studying. I try",
        "comment": "Comma splice; two independent clauses require a full stop or conjunction.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      }
    ],
    "Word order": [
      {
        "excerpt": "each my day",
        "correction": "each of my days",
        "comment": "Incorrect quantifier structure.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      }
    ],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],
    "Register": [],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {
      "item": "overload",
      "cefr_level": "B2",
      "category": "Vocabulary",
      "note": "Appropriate use of B2 vocabulary in context."
    },
    {
      "item": "abuse",
      "cefr_level": "B2",
      "category": "Vocabulary",
      "note": "Precise verb choice regarding help."
    },
    {
      "item": "though you shouldn't... it's actually ok",
      "cefr_level": "B2",
      "category": "Grammar",
      "note": "Successful use of concession clause structure."
    },
    {
      "item": "However, ... Also, ... So",
      "cefr_level": "B2",
      "category": "Discourse marker",
      "note": "Good variety of connectors to structure the argument."
    }
  ],
  "feedback": "Level B1. The text demonstrates good communicative competence with clear organization and effective use of discourse markers (However, Firstly, For example). Vocabulary shows ambition (overload, abuse) reaching B2. However, grammatical control remains at B1 due to persistent errors in word order ('each my day'), articles ('very important thing'), and punctuation (comma splices). Proofreading for spelling ('decition') and article usage is recommended.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Review rules for articles (a/an/the) with abstract nouns.",
    "Practice word order with quantifiers (each of my days vs each my day).",
    "Proofread for spelling and comma splices before submitting."
  ]
}
